message:
fix(freeze): add getter/setter support and fix inline atom handling

js_value.zig:
- Add definePropertyGetSet for getter/setter property definitions
- Add JS_PROP_ENUMERABLE, JS_PROP_HAS_GET, JS_PROP_HAS_SET constants

module_parser.zig:
- Remove early returns for inline atoms (is_new flag)
- Inline atoms can now be looked up from the full atom table
